overview: The Wausau Board of Public Works approved contracts for the 26th Street construction project, approved a change order for the Randolph/Cherry Street project addressing unexpected underground conditions, and approved a pay estimate and concrete license. All items passed unanimously with no opposition.

agenda.item: Call to order and approval of March 10th regular Board of Public Works minutes
Open bids for 26th Street construction project
Open bids for North 8th Avenue project (postponed)
2025 Street Construction Project A - Randolph Street, Cherry Street - Change Order 1
2025 Street Construction Project A - Pay Estimate Number 9
Portland cement concrete license for KSK Incorporated

discussions.item: March 10th Board of Public Works Minutes
discussions.body: Minutes were approved with a motion and second. Passed unanimously with voice vote.

Seven bids were opened and read aloud. Switlick submitted the lowest bid at $1,279,089.75, narrowly beating Hos at $1,280,877.96. Other bidders included A1 ($1,374,600), Francis Melvin ($1,385,383), Steen ($1,489,126), James Peterson ($1,570,698.56), and Earth ($1,686,780.75). A board member noted the 'tight bids' between the top two. Motion to approve Switlick as the contractor passed unanimously.
Staff announced this item would be postponed as the bid opening was extended. Will return at a future meeting.

discussions.item: 2025 Street Construction Project A - Change Order 1
discussions.body: Staff presented four items totaling $14,436.50: an inside drop on a manhole ($4,856) due to an unrecorded large diameter sanitary service; water main work ($2,317.50) because an existing 6-inch main was found instead of the expected 8-inch; miscellaneous storm sewer tie-ins ($5,016) negotiated down to $66 per linear foot; and geogrid installation ($2,247) for approximately 750 square yards near Thomas Jefferson Elementary due to poor soil conditions. Change Order 2 regarding liquidated damages was postponed pending further discussions. Motion to approve passed unanimously.

discussions.item: 2025 Street Construction Project A - Pay Estimate Number 9
discussions.body: Staff recommended approval of pay estimate for work completed through the end of the year in the amount of $535,114.20 from Haw Suns Incorporated. Motion to approve passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Portland Cement Concrete License - KSK Incorporated
discussions.body: A board member named Vinnie confirmed he reviewed the application and everything was in order. Motion to approve the license passed unanimously.

actionItems: Switlick awarded 26th Street construction project contract at $1,279,089.75
North 8th Avenue bid opening postponed to future meeting
Change Order 1 for Randolph/Cherry Street project approved for $14,436.50
Change Order 2 with liquidated damages to return at future meeting pending discussions
Pay Estimate #9 approved for $535,114.20 to Haw Suns Incorporated
Portland cement concrete license approved for KSK Incorporated
title: Wausau Board of Public Works Meeting - 3/17/2026 - 3/17/2026 - 3/17/2026
